Meaning.Vi: Cổng (đóng/mở để kiểm soát ra vào)
Meaning.En: A barrier, door, or opening in a fence or wall, typically one that can be opened or closed to control access.
Meaning.Example: The security guard opened the gate to let the delivery truck enter the compound.

Situation.Vi: Cổng nhà, cổng khu vực được kiểm soát ra vào.
Situation.En: A physical gate at a property boundary or secured area.

Meaning.Vi: Cổng lên máy bay (ở sân bay)
Meaning.En: A designated entrance or exit point at an airport where passengers board or disembark from aircraft.
Meaning.Example: Passengers for Flight 402 should proceed to Gate B7.

Situation.Vi: Cổng lên máy bay trong sân bay.
Situation.En: The area in an airport where passengers wait to board their plane.

Meaning.En: A device in an electronic circuit that performs a logical operation on one or more binary inputs and produces a single output.
Meaning.Example: An AND gate outputs high only when all its inputs are high.

Situation.Vi: Cổng logic trong vi mạch điện tử.
Situation.En: A fundamental building block in digital electronics and computer architecture.
